_meta.purpose: 1 POST body that created api.requests.latency.app — a new log-based metric (distribution on @duration_ms, group_by @path/@method) that replaces the original api.requests.latency. The original was locked to @lambda.billed_duration from Vercel runtime logs, which the broken log drain no longer delivers; api.requests.latency.app is fed by the new request_completed log line emitted from apps/api auth wrappers. The original api.requests.latency was intentionally left untouched to preserve historical data.
_meta.transitional: PRD-159 will replace this file with HCL in cl-tofu-aws-live/prod/datadog/pipelines/. Delete this file when PRD-159 lands.
